title: canthium vulgare
intro: Canthium vulgare, also known as Wild Garlic or Pachakunnel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Canthium vulgare include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate digestive issues. Canthium vulgare can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
